Class GeoDistanceOrder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.domain.Sort.Order
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.query.Order
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.query.GeoDistanceOrder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class GeoDistanceOrder extends Order
Sort.Order derived class to be able to define a _geo_distance order for a search.
Since:
4.0
Author:
Peter-Josef Meisch
See Also:
